assignments.title: Final Project — Personal Data Tool
assignments.summary: Build a Python program (200+ LOC) that ingests a personal dataset of your choice (CSV/JSON), performs at least 3 useful queries, and produces a short written reflection on what you learned about the data.
assignments.real_world_tie: Same data-cleaning + analysis pattern used by analysts at every company — a portable, demonstrable skill.

assignments.title: Project 2 — Argument Essay (1500-2000 words)
assignments.summary: Write a sustained argumentative essay on a contested issue of your choice. Must include at least 5 sources, at least 2 of which are peer-reviewed.
assignments.real_world_tie: The exact structure used in op-eds, policy memos, and grant justifications — argue for a change, anticipate objections, support with evidence.

assignments.title: Lab 8 — Photosynthesis Rate Experiment
assignments.weight: Counts as 1 of 10 lab reports (20% category)
assignments.summary: Design and run an experiment that measures photosynthesis rate in spinach leaf disks under three light intensities. Submit a full lab report (intro, methods, results with graph, discussion).
assignments.real_world_tie: Mirrors how field biologists and ag-tech researchers test crop responses — same write-up format used for journal submissions.
